2605.03596.title: Workspace-Bench 1.0: Benchmarking AI Agents on Workspace Tasks with Large-Scale File Dependencies
2605.03596.paper_summary: Workspace learning requires AI agents to identify, reason over, exploit, and update explicit and implicit dependencies among heterogeneous files in a worker's workspace, enabling them to complete both routine and advanced tasks effectively. Despite its importance, existing relevant benchmarks largely evaluate agents on pre-specified or synthesized files with limited real-world dependencies, leaving workspace-level evaluation underexplored. To this end, we introduce Workspace-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating AI agents on Workspace Learning invOlving Large-Scale File Dependencies. We construct realistic workspaces with 5 worker profiles, 74 file types, 20,476 files (up to 20GB) and curate 388 tasks, each with its own file dependency graph, evaluated across 7,399 total rubrics that require cross-file retrieval, contextual reasoning, and adaptive decision-making. We further provide Workspace-Bench-Lite, a 100-task subset that preserves the benchmark distribution while reducing evaluation costs by about 70%. We evaluate 4 popular agent harnesses and 7 foundation models. Experimental results show that current agents remain far from reliable workspace learning, where the best reaches only 68.7%, substantially below the human result of 80.7%, and the average performance across agents is only 47.4%.
2605.03596.paper_summary_zh: 工作區學習要求人工智慧代理識別、推理、利用並更新工人工作區中異質文件之間的顯性和隱性依賴關係，使其能夠有效地完成常規和高級任務。儘管其重要性，現有相關基準主要在預先指定或合成的文件上評估代理，這些文件的真實世界依賴關係有限，導致工作區級別的評估尚未深入探討。為此，我們介紹了Workspace-Bench，一個用於評估人工智慧代理在涉及大規模文件依賴的工作區學習中的基準。我們構建了現實的工作區，擁有5個工人檔案、74種文件類型、20,476個文件（最多20GB），並策劃了388個任務，每個任務都有自己的文件依賴圖，並在7,399個總評分標準中進行評估，這些標準需要跨文件檢索、上下文推理和自適應決策。我們進一步提供了Workspace-Bench-Lite，一個包含100個任務的子集，保持基準分佈的同時將評估成本降低約70%。我們評估了4個流行的代理框架和7個基礎模型。實驗結果顯示，當前的代理在可靠的工作區學習方面仍然相差甚遠，其中最佳表現僅達到68.7%，遠低於人類的80.7%結果，代理的平均表現僅為47.4%。
2605.03596.author: Zirui Tang et.al.
2605.03596.authors: Zirui Tang, Xuanhe Zhou, Yumou Liu, Linchun Li, Weizheng Wang, Hongzhang Huang, Jun Zhou, Jiachen Song, Shaoli Yu, Jinqi Wang, Zihang Zhou, Hongyi Zhou, Yuting Lv, Jinyang Li, Jiashuo Liu, Ruoyu Chen, Chunwei Liu, GuoLiang Li, Jihua Kang, Fan Wu
